payload.description: A new draft version of Medication Review: Individual Confirmation has been created to make the bounded medication-review segment requirement explicit, forbid pooling scattered medication mentions across the call, and state that truncated fragments do not count unless the actual review exchange is visible. Draft version: f1040a1b-ab02-48db-9ed6-18af22703c55. Review the wording and promote/publish only after explicit approval.
payload.title: Review and publish Individual Confirmation scope-clarification draft if approved
